title: Get Lucky
why_this_song: Get Lucky by Daft Punk (2013) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.

vocab_hooks.note: Appears 56 times; first heard in: "She's up all night 'til the sun"
Appears 44 times; first heard in: "We're up all night 'til the sun"
Appears 32 times; first heard in: "I'm up all night to get lucky"
Appears 6 times; first heard in: "She's up all night 'til the sun"
Appears 6 times; first heard in: "She's up all night for good fun"

teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.
copyright_notice: Short fair-use lyric excerpts only (Brazilian Lei 9.610/98 art. 46 VIII). No full lyrics stored.

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "night" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "night" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "we're" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "we're" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: Put these three lines in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: Coloque estes três versos na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: Like the legend of the phoenix, huh
To give up who we are
We're up all night to get lucky

exercises.prompt_en: If you could ask Daft Punk one question about "Get Lucky", what would it be and why?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você pudesse perguntar uma coisa para Daft Punk sobre "Get Lucky", o que seria e por quê?

exercises.prompt_en: Rewrite the chorus of "Get Lucky" in your own words — keep the meaning but change the style (formal, slang, poetic, whatever you like).
exercises.prompt_pt: Reescreva o refrão de "Get Lucky" com suas palavras — mantenha o sentido mas mude o estilo (formal, gíria, poético, o que preferir).

exercises.prompt_en: If you had to summarize "Get Lucky" in one sentence to someone who has never heard it, what would you say?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você tivesse que resumir "Get Lucky" em uma frase para alguém que nunca ouviu, o que diria?

exercises.prompt_en: Write the full form of each contraction:
exercises.prompt_pt: Escreva a forma completa de cada contração:
